data.services.yaml:
services:
  admin-service:
    description: Administrative operations and system management
    health_check: /health
    retries: 2
    timeout: 30
    url: http://role-management:9012
  agent-learning-service:
    description: Agent personas, skills management, and learning from feedback
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://agent-service:9006
  agent-manager-service:
    description: AI agent lifecycle management and orchestration
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://agent-service:9006
  ai-agent-service:
    description: AI Agent orchestration, session management, and LLM integration
    health_check: /health
    retries: 2
    timeout: 120
    url: http://ai-agent:9006
  audit-compliance-service:
    description: Audit logging and compliance management
    health_check: /health
    retries: 2
    timeout: 30
    url: http://audit-compliance:9019
  audit-service:
    description: Audit events and logging service
    health_check: /health
    retries: 2
    timeout: 30
    url: http://audit-service:8041
  auth-service:
    description: Authentication and authorization service
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 10
    url: http://auth-service:9001
  bac-marketplace-service:
    description: Process marketplace for publishing, downloading, and sharing processes
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://bac-marketplace:9015
  backend-service:
    description: Main FlowMaster backend monolith with all core APIs
    health_check: /api/health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://backend-service:8002
  collections-service:
    description: Data collections service
    health_check: /health/live
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://collections-service:8022
  communication-service:
    description: Multi-channel communication orchestration
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 15
    url: http://communication:9020
  credential-vault-service:
    description: Secure credential storage and management for external integrations
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://credential-vault:8000
  data-hub-service:
    description: External data integration and ETL service
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://data-intelligence:9004
  data-intelligence-service:
    description: AI-powered data mapping, schema discovery, and field analysis
    health_check: /health/live
    retries: 2
    timeout: 120
    url: http://data-intelligence:9004
  document-intelligence-service:
    description: AI-powered document processing and process extraction
    health_check: /health/live
    retries: 2
    timeout: 120
    url: http://document-intelligence:9002
  dxg-service:
    description: AI-powered dynamic UI component and form generation
    health_check: /health
    retries: 2
    timeout: 60
    url: http://dxg-service:8000
  encryption-service:
    description: Data encryption/decryption and cryptographic utilities
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://encryption-service:8030
  engage-collaboration-service:
    description: Engage collaboration and inbox messaging service
    health_check: /health
    retries: 2
    timeout: 30
    url: http://engage-collaboration:8021
  event-bus-service:
    description: Event-driven messaging and pub/sub service
    health_check: /v1/monitoring/health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 10
    url: http://event-bus:9013
  execution-engine:
    description: Process execution engine with state management
    health_check: /health
    retries: 2
    timeout: 60
    url: http://execution-engine:9005
  external-integration-service:
    description: External system connectors, webhook management, and third-party API
      integration
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 60
    url: http://external-integration:9016
  hubs-service:
    description: Process hubs management service
    health_check: /health/live
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://hubs-service:8022
  human-task-service:
    description: Human task assignment and management
    health_check: /health/live
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://human-task:9006
  import-export-service:
    description: Data import/export service supporting JSON, CSV, BPMN XML formats
    health_check: /health
    retries: 2
    timeout: 60
    url: http://backend-service:8002
  internal-datahub-service:
    description: Internal data hub for cross-service data synchronization
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://data-intelligence:9004
  kms-service:
    description: Encryption key management and cryptographic operations
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://kms-service:9025
  knowledge-hub-service:
    description: RAG, knowledge management, agent data access, and feedback capture
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 60
    url: http://knowledge-hub:9017
  legal-entity-service:
    description: Organizational structure, legal entities, and relationship management
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://legal-entity-service:8014
  llm-integration-service:
    description: LLM provider integration and model management
    health_check: /health
    retries: 2
    timeout: 60
    url: http://llm-integration-service:9010
  notification-service:
    description: Multi-channel notification service (email, SMS, push, in-app)
    health_check: /health/live
    retries: 3
    timeout: 10
    url: http://flowmaster-notification-service:8021
  organization-service:
    description: Organization structure, positions, mandates, delegations, and legal
      entities
    health_check: /health/live
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://organization-service:8015
  portal-management-service:
    description: Multi-tenant portal configuration and management
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://backend-service:8002
  process-analytics-service:
    description: Process performance metrics, bottleneck detection, and analytics
      dashboards
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://data-intelligence:9004
  process-design-service:
    description: BPMN process design and modeling service
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://process-design:9003
  process-linking-service:
    description: Cross-process dependencies and linking
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://process-design:9003
  process-versioning-service:
    description: Process version management, diff, and branching
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://process-design:9003
  process-views-service:
    description: Flow chart views and process visualization
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://process-design:9003
  prompt-engineering-service:
    description: Prompt templates, versioning, and dynamic assembly for LLM interactions
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://prompt-engineering:9018
  role-management-service:
    description: Role-based access control and permission management
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://role-management:9012
  rules-engine-service:
    description: DMN-style decision tables, rule evaluation, and business logic management
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://business-rules-engine:9011
  scheduling-service:
    description: Cron triggers, time-based process automation, timezone-aware schedules
    health_check: /health/live
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://scheduling:9008
  sdx-service:
    description: Smart Data Exchange - unified data access layer for connections,
      datasources, and native tables
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://sdx:9027
  sdx-stream-service:
    description: SDX Stream - real-time data streaming and event processing
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://sdx-stream:8600
  service-registry:
    description: Service discovery and health monitoring
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 10
    url: http://service-registry:8001
  settings-service:
    description: System settings, user preferences, and configuration management
    health_check: /health
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://settings-service:8031
  websocket-gateway:
    description: Real-time WebSocket communication gateway
    health_check: /api/v1/ws/health/liveness
    retries: 2
    timeout: 30
    url: http://websocket-gateway:9010
    ws_url: ws://websocket-gateway:9010
  widgets-service:
    description: Process widgets management service
    health_check: /health/live
    retries: 3
    timeout: 30
    url: http://widgets-service:8023
  frontend-nextjs-service:
    description: Next.js frontend server - handles Next.js API routes
    health_check: /
    retries: 2
    timeout: 30
    url: http://frontend-nextjs:3000
